faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in Indian Institute of Ayurvedic Medicine and Research?
faqs.answer: No, students looking for admission must have a valid NEET UG score. Candidates looking for admission at the Indian Institute of Ayurvedic Medicine and Research can enrol for admission with Class 12 marks. The institute offers only one course, i.e., Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery. The BAMS course is a five-year and half-years duration, which includes one year of internship.

paragraphs: Indian Institute of Ayurvedic Medicine and Research admissionsare completely based on entrance exam scores. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at the Indian Institute of Ayurvedic Medicine and Research is as per the steps below:

Students seeking admission to BAMS are required to apply via the NEET UG entrance exam.
STEP 2: Selection

The institute admits students based on entrance exam scores, which are NEET UG scores followed by Karnataka NEET UG Counselling. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for final selection.
STEP 3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation

review_content.Placements: Only 50% of the students from our course got placed. The highest salary package offered in our course is 5 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 2 LPA. The average salary package offered is 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Sun Pharmaceuticals, Dr. Reddy's Laboratories, Meridian Pharmaceuticals, etc., visit our college for placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities available in our college are good. The college provides facilities like computer labs, library facility and E-library. Students attend online lectures and also previously missed lectures on the website of our college. Facilities available in the hostel are also good, and they take care of hygiene. Food served in the mess and canteen is also good.

content.Placements: The placements are very good that is so many companies such as sun pharma, dr reddy etc. Took placements and thus placements percentage is at 95% which is good enough for a college to be a best and such bigger companies gave a chance for best students to take their growth at higher level.

college_info.college_name: Lokmanya Homoeopathic Medical College: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

reviews_list.review_title: The college staff is good but helpful but the bad thing is that no campus grounds.

review_content.Placements: Our course does not have a percentage level. Admission based on NEET mark. The salary package is about 1LPA. Our College does not have a company and all we are doing job in a hospital only. Fests are celebrated in my college all students are enjoying the gathering days.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are very poor no AC available in the library. No canteen on the college premises. My college does not provide any type of hostel my college does not have a single hostel for boys even not for girls also, the students stay on their own.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery (BHMS) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: The important is that the college is attached with YCM hospital and qualified teaching staff.

review_content.Placements: There is an entrance exam called NEET and on the basis of that exam, the students are placed in our course. Ours is a professional course so there is no type of placement or salary package. There are no companies that recruit. There is a hospital for practice purposes. Our college internship is at YCM hospital, Pimpri. There are many specialists in our course like medicine, pediatrics, gynacologist, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. Wi-Fi is available on our whole campus. Labs are available like pathology lab, pharmacy lab, and physiology lab. Hostel is available with good food service in our area also there is a good type of mess. Sports and games are also available.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery (BHMS) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: There are good placements in well-reputed hospitals.

review_content.Placements: I have joined the BHMS course recently, so I have no idea about salary packages, etc. Our society is inclining towards homoeopathy recently. Many medical students get the opportunity to work in the Lokmanya hospital only. Some of the students got recruited by other hospitals. About 100% of the students get internships from our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are much modernised and spacious here, and they can accommodate 80 students at a time. Wi-Fi has a good connection, and students utilise this Wi-Fi service for study purposes. Labs are well maintained with all the necessary equipment. Our college canteen serves moderate quality food. Students are encouraged to take part in sports.

highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: I would totally recommend the college.

review_content.Placements: The top roles may vary from anesthesiologist and general surgeon, specialisations, dean, general medicine doctor, advanced super specialists etc. Almost 75-85% of students get internships. The highest package might be approximately 20 lakhs per annum, and the minimum is 5 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: It is a well-developed college with good infrastructure. Our chairman made sure that all the equipment in both the college and hospital were to be advanced so that every student and doctor will get to know about them, and the patients can get a high quality treatment.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied until now because of staff members and way of teaching from 2017 to until now.

review_content.Placements: About 80% of the students will pass out every year from our college. Placements are good here, and many students qualified in NEET PG with better marks. The number of outpatients is increasing every year. All the students doing internships in our college are getting a stipend of around Rs. 2,000-3,000 every month.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel hospitality is very good, but it has to improve food quality. The canteen is available in between boys and girls hostel. There is a canteen in the hospital 24x7, and ATM facility is also available for students. Roads inside the college are awesome.

review_summary.college_name: Katuri Medical College and Hospital Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of Katuri Medical College and Hospital .

content.Placements: Placements are not offered in our college. The foundation for our PG preparation is sound, and faculty help us through our journey. An internship must be done for one year in the hospital associated with college. A single batch has a size of 150 members in a class.
content.Infrastructure: Labs, classroom, and library, where all basic amenities are present. Gym, sports ground for cricket basketball, badminton, and throwball. hostel food is average. The canteen also has good food. Medical facilities are obviously provided whenever needed.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of Katuri Medical College.

content.Placements: There are no placements as such, but the college offers a year of internship in the final year for more clinical exposure. Students are paid for this internship, which provides valuable experience for their future practice. Hospital visits start from the second professional year.
content.Infrastructure: The college has all necessary facilities, including labs and hostels. However, the maintenance of these facilities is not up to the mark; the hostels often stink and are not worth the premium. There is also a bus facility for students from nearby areas.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I would totally recommend the college.

content.Placements: The top roles may vary from anesthesiologist and general surgeon, specialisations, dean, general medicine doctor, advanced super specialists etc. Almost 75-85% of students get internships. The highest package might be approximately 20 lakhs per annum, and the minimum is 5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: It is a well-developed college with good infrastructure. Our chairman made sure that all the equipment in both the college and hospital were to be advanced so that every student and doctor will get to know about them, and the patients can get a high quality treatment.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied until now because of staff members and way of teaching from 2017 to until now.

content.Placements: About 80% of the students will pass out every year from our college. Placements are good here, and many students qualified in NEET PG with better marks. The number of outpatients is increasing every year. All the students doing internships in our college are getting a stipend of around Rs. 2,000-3,000 every month.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel hospitality is very good, but it has to improve food quality. The canteen is available in between boys and girls hostel. There is a canteen in the hospital 24x7, and ATM facility is also available for students. Roads inside the college are awesome.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It has good infrastructure, decent faculty and facilities.

content.Placements: Around 50% of the students got placed in the first attempt after internships. The highest package offered is around 1 Lac per month, and the lowest salary is around Rs. 30,000 per month depending on the branch of PG. Mostly, private medical colleges or hospitals offer placements. After completing MBBS, everyone does a 1-year internship. Junior doctor and resident doctor roles are offered.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is present in the library only. Labs are neat and adequate for the course. Classrooms are digitalized. The library is good with many books and journals. I am not a hostler, but as per my friends, the hostel is average. Mess becomes routine after few days, but the breakfast is good. Medical facilities are excellent. You can play many sports if you are a hosteler.

faqs.answer: It depends on the course in which the student is interested. Admission to The American College, Madurai is fairly competitive and for MBA/PGDM, eligibility is a first undergraduate degree with at least 50% marks in relevant subjects. The college is not as difficult to access as the top college institutions, but it proves to be hard for low scorers of entrance exams. Admissions to various other courses such as BSc , BVoc, BCom, etc. are considered a bit easy.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fees range for courses offerred by The American College?
overview_faqs.answer: The fees range for courses offerred by The American College is around INR 2377 - INR 216560.

review_summary.college_name: The American College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Mathematics - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Student review for American College.

content.Placements: Placements are regularly offered to us. Students with a minimum of 60% marks in semester exams are eligible for campus interviews and placements. Companies like RAMCO Cement, WIPRO, and HCL, among others, offered various jobs such as Technician, with a salary package of 3 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Our college comprises numerous departments for both aided and self-finance students. Each department boasts separate Wi-Fi, a library, and classrooms, while the science department is equipped with labs. Infrastructure-wise, our college features a wide-ranging campus. The hostel food was above average for both students and staff.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. in Information Technology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty and good placements in 2024.

content.Placements: 50% of students got placed in various companies like banking, IT, and medical billing sectors. HDB Financial, Shriram Financial, and any finance companies come to recruit students on campus. Most of the students got placed in companies.
content.Infrastructure: The college has many facilities like Wi-Fi, neat classrooms with LED projectors, and a big library to gain information. The hostel food is very nice. The sports masters are kind to us. We can make many presence in sports. Our college sports academy is the best in Madurai district.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in Economics - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is a wonderful college but I am dissatisfied with some people.

content.Placements: Placements are available at this college but the job positions are not professional. Insurance agent, telecalling, and NGO teacher roles are offered to students in placements. About 65% of students can apply for those placements. From the batch 2024, internships are compulsory.
content.Infrastructure: Free Wi-Fi is available over the campus. We can use it for valuable purposes. There are systems in the library, that can be used for academic purposes and to improve knowledge. There are separate computer labs for curriculum practices. There is a main library and department libraries.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Mathematics - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review by the student of The American College.

content.Placements: Actually, placements are good and enough, but the actual amount of applications is high for admissions. Some students are selected by the admission committee by a merit-based system. MNCs like Wipro and IIT offer placements in final-year.
content.Infrastructure: The American College infrastructure is huge and enormous. In Madurai, The American College is very good in infrastructure. People from various places have good opinions of this college. The college has many facilities like food for long travelers, Wi-Fi for students, canteens, etc.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Mathematics - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely Satisfied with the Facilities and Top-Class Placement.

content.Placements: Around 70% of students choose to attend a university. The remaining students choose professions such as teaching, administration, and taking state examinations. Getting an internship is easy. The staff and the university are very supportive during the internship.
content.Infrastructure: Consumption is almost stable. There is a greenery story. Although the refrigerator is located downtown, it is located on campus. The hotel is very nice. The food is worth the money. Discipline is maintained where necessary. The hostel is a beautiful place to stay. Laboratories are fully equipped and furnished with modern equipment. They have access to equipment and tests.

admission_overview.college_name: The American College Courses Admission 2025: Application Process, Eligibility Criteria, Fees

paragraphs: The American College admission is entrance based for courses offered at UG, PG, and Doctorate levels. Some of the popular exams accepted by the institution for admission are CAT, MAT, and CONSORTIUM, etc. The institution offers 71 courses to the students in the stream of IT & Software, Humanities & Social Sciences, Science, Business & Management Studies, and Mass Communication & Media, among others. At the UG level, some of the popularThe American College coursesinclude B.A, B.Sc, and BCA and at the PG level, the institution offers, MCA, MBA/PGDM, and M.A., among others. Candidates interested in The American College admission 2025 can check the fees and other details below:
lists: The American College Fees: The total tuition fees for UG courses range between INR 2,142 - INR 213,615 and the total tuition fees for PG courses range between INR 1,248 - INR 371,510. Other than the tuition fees, students might also be required to pay application, exam and other fee components. This fee information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.
The American College Course Duration: The duration for UG courses offered at The American College is 3 years and the same for PG courses is 2 years.

courses_data.name: The American College BSc Admission 2025
courses_data.description: The American College BSc admission is open. The college offers this course with a duration of three years in a full-time mode. To be eligible for admission candidates are required to pass Class 12 withMathematics, Physics, andChemistryas compulsory subjects from a recognised board. The American College offers direct admission based on the last qualifying exam score. To know more about The American College BSc courses, seat intake and fees, go through the following section:

faqs.question: Is B.Sc available at The American College?
faqs.answer: The American College offers BSC with a duration of three years.The college offers merit based admission to BSc. To be eligible for admission, candidates need to pass Class 12 from a recognised board.After fill out the admission criteria candidates are, ust to apply online for admisison.

faqs.question: How many specialisations are offered by The American College for B.Sc?
faqs.answer: The American College offers over sixteen specialisations in BSc. The courses are offered for three years. To full fill the eligiblity, candidates are required to pass  Class 12 with Mathematics, Physics, and Chemistry as compulsory subjects from a recognised board.  Some of  specialisation offers by The American College given below:BSc in Computer Science (Self financed)BSc in Visual CommunicationBSc in Information TechnologyBSc in MicrobiologyBSc in PsychologyBSc Food Science and Nutrition

faqs.question: Can I take direct admission to B.Sc at The American College?
faqs.answer: Yes, The American College offers merit-based admission to BSc courses. Candidates are required to complete the eligibility criteria and apply on the official website of the college for admission. The eligibility criteria for admission is to pass Class 12 with Mathematics, Physics, and Chemistry as compulsory subjects from a recognised board. After completing all the admission procedures, the college offers direct admission based on the last qualifying exam scores.

courses_data.name: The American College MSc Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Admission is merit-based at the American College for the MSc course, which is full-time mode that is completed in 2-years. Those who want to avail the MSc course, are required to have a BSc degree in the appropriate major subjects with at least 40% aggregate in Part Ill Major and Ancillaries. The college offers MSc in various specialisations such asM.Sc. in Food Science and Nutrition, MSc in Microbiology,MSc in Chemistry, and others. To be eligible for admission, it is mandatory to fill out an online application form by visiting the college's official website. Below is more information about The American College eligibility requirements, selection criteria, and fees:

faqs.question: How many specialisations are offered by The American College in M.Sc?
faqs.answer: The American College offer various specialisations in MSc. The college offers merit-based admission to MSc.The specialisations offered by The American College are as follows:MSc  SpecialisationsMsc in Food Science and NutritionMSc in Data ScienceMSc in Visual CommunicationMSc in MicrobiologyMsc in Applied PsychologyMSc in BotanyMSc in ChemistryMSc3 in PhysicsMSc7 in Zoology

faqs.question: Can I join M.Sc directly at The American College?
faqs.answer: Yes, The American College offers merit-based admission to MSc. Candidates interested to get admission to MSc must have passed BSc in the appropriate major subjects with a minimum of 40% aggregate in Part Ill Major and Ancillaries. Additionally, candidates are required to fill out the application form online by visiting the college official website to be eligible for admission.

faqs.question: How can I get admission at The American College for M.Sc?
faqs.answer: The American College offers two-year MSc courses in a full time mode. Interested candidates are required to pass BSc with 40% aggreagte to get admision to MSc. Ater completeing the criteria candidate can apply online for admission.

courses_data.name: The American College MCA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: The American College offers a two-year full-time MCA course at PG level. The college offers entrance-based admission to BA. To be eligible for admission, candidates are required to apply and appear for TANCET exam. Additionally, candidates are required to fulfil the eligibility criteria, i.e., pass graduation degree in the relevant stream. After completing the admission criteria set by the college, candidates are required to apply online by visiting the official website of the college. Go through the below section for more details about The American College MCA admission 2025:

faqs.question: What are the eligibility criteria for admission to MCA at The American College?
faqs.answer: To be eligible for MCA, candidates must have a graduation degree from a recognised university. The college offers entrance-based admission to MCA.To get admission, candidates must required to apply and appear for TANCET exam.

courses_data.name: The American College MCA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: The American College offers a two-year full-time MCA course at PG level. The college offers entrance-based admission to BA. To be eligible for admission, candidates are required to apply and appear for TANCET exam. Additionally, candidates are required to fulfil the eligibility criteria, i.e., pass graduation degree in the relevant stream. After completing the admission criteria set by the college, candidates are required to apply online by visiting the official website of the college. Go through the below section for more details about The American College MCA admission 2025:

faqs.question: What are the eligibility criteria for admission to MCA at The American College?
faqs.answer: To be eligible for MCA, candidates must have a graduation degree from a recognised university. The college offers entrance-based admission to MCA.To get admission, candidates must required to apply and appear for TANCET exam.

faqs.question: What are the courses that The American College offers?
faqs.answer: The American College Madurai admissionis offered to 23 UG, 21 PG, and nine PhD courses. These courses are offered in the feild ofScience, Arts, Commerce, Management, Computer Science, etc.The college offers admission based on both entrances as well as the merit score of candidates. To apply for admission to American College Maduraicandidates are required visit the college's official website. The table below mentions some of the popular The American College  courses along their eligibility and selection criteria:CourseEligibilitySelection CriteriaBScClass 12 in the relevant streamMerit-basedMScBachelor’s degree in the concerned subjectMerit-basedMCABachelor’s 12 with Commerce from a recognised boardMerit-basedBAClass 12 in the relevant stream from a recognised boardMerit-basedMBA /PGDMGraduation in any streamMAT/ CAT/ TANCETMABachelor degree in the relevant streamMerit-basedBCAClass 12 in the relevant streamMerit-basedMCABachelor’s degree in the relevant streamTANCETMComBachelor’s degre

faqs.question: What is the admission criteria of the American College?
faqs.answer: The American College admission criteria for most of the courses is based on merit-secured in the qualifying exam. However, admission to the MBA and MCA is based on the performance of the candidate in the entrance exam. The entrance exams accepted by the American College are CAT, MAT, and TANCET.

faqs.question: How hard is getting admission into The American College?
faqs.answer: It depends on the course in which the student is interested. Admission to The American College, Madurai is fairly competitive and for MBA/PGDM, eligibility is a first undergraduate degree with at least 50% marks in relevant subjects. The students also must qualify through an entrance exam like MAT, CAT, or TANCET before being counseled for admission.The college is not as difficult to access as the top college institutions, but it proves to be hard for low scorers of entrance exams. Admission involves document verification and counseling, while merit and examination score determine seat allocation. Admissions to various other courses such as BSc , BVoc, BCom, etc. are considered a bit easy.

placement_report.college_name: The American College Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: The American College Placement Overview
paragraphs: The American College has not released the 2023 placement report or brochure. However, the NIRF report 2023 is out on the official website. As per the report, 253 UG (3-year) and 208 PG (2-year) students were placed in 2022. The median package offered to UG (3-year) and PG (2-year) students during The American College placements 2022 was INR 24.02 LPA and INR 2.04 LPA , respectively.

data: The American College Placements 2022: An upsurge of 50% was recorded in the 2022 median package of UG (3-year) courses when compared with 2021 A drop of 15% was observed in the 2022 median package of PG (2-year) courses when compared with 2021

The American College TANCET Cutoff 2025 is out for admission to MBA/PGDM for all rounds and categories for students belonging to the AI quota. The maximum TANCET cutoff required for admissions in the last round was 3155 for MBA/PGDM admission in the General category. Tabulated below is the TANCET first and last round cutoff 2025.

The American College MBA/PGDM cutoff 2025 can be seen in this section, along with the previous 2-years cutoff data, i.e., 2024, and 2023. In 2025 the last round rank for MBA/PGDM stood at 3155 among the students belonging to the General AI quota. For the OBC AI quota, the cutoff rank for the same course was 5296.
After comparing both the categories, the last Round cutoff rank for General AI category students was more competitive for admission than the OBC AI students.

hostel_campus.college_name: The American College Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: The college has four hostels for men: Washburn Hall, Dudley Hall, Wallace Hall and Zumbro Hall. There are two hostels for women: Women’s Hall and Noyes Garden. Both are located in the main campus itself with limited accommodation.

library.description: The college has well-equipped library with a rich collection of about 1,46,000 books. It subscribes to 700 different journals covering a wide range of subjects. Students can use internet facility at the library. Each student can withdraw a maximum of 10 books at a time. Each department has its own specialized library SCILET (Study Centre for Indian Literature in English and Translation) is a research library, housing about 11,000 books and 75 Journals.Access to e-resources is available in the library.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Hockey Ground

The best books and subject books are available in the main library. The curriculum-following books are available in the specific department library. Three canteens with awesome flavored foods.

reviews.review_heading: American College Review .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very old, built by the Americans in the year 1881. The campus is green and plastic free. WiFi, laboratories, library and the classrooms are available. It has all the basic facilities required including canteen facilities. All the sports and games activities are present.

reviews.review_heading: Best faculty, good placement in 2023.
reviews.review_text: Departments provide Wi-Fi connection. Labs are very clean, and the apparatus is in good condition. Classrooms are of a reasonable size. Hostel food is very good and tasty. There are mess and canteen facilities available, and medical facilities are also provided. Sports and games are available on campus.

reviews.review_heading: The best college in Madurai.
reviews.review_text: Our institution provides clean and spacious hostels for both boys and girls. We have three women's hostels and one men's hostel. We have a capacious mess in the hostel, and we are provided with hygienic food, both vegetarian and non-vegetarian. We have Wi-Fi facilities for educational purposes. And we have three canteens and small stalls on our campus.

reviews.review_heading: It is totally a good college which values for the money paid. We could acquire more knowledge.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure was pretty good and peaceful. It surrounded by greenery. Inside the campus free Wi-Fi is available. Hostel facilities also available inside the campus. Mess food is average. Food also available in the canteen and the price will also affordable. Classroom is enough for the strength of the students.

reviews.review_heading: Fully satisfied with the faculty, college environment, and good placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, and all other facilities are available. In our college library, more than 10,000 books are available. The library is very easy to use and atomized. The Wi-Fi is good. The college environment is very nice, fully surrounded by trees and plants. The hostel has good food.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good and getting good marks will take to you the placement.
reviews.review_text: The Labs, library, department functions, more classes, canteen, and the hostel are just good not too good. Sometimes the hostel food is so bad we can't eat so we eat the food from outside of the college. The sports are cricket, football basketball, kabaddi, badminton, Athletics handball etc.

college_info.college_name: The American College

data.description: Madurai American College has a very well-seasoned faculty that comprises the right prerequisites for excellent academic performance and growth. Many professors obtained post-graduate degrees from eminent institutions and have extensive experience in the discipline. All of them are known for a student-centric approach to innovative modes of teaching and mentors in research activities as well as co-curricula. The dedication and experience are combined to make the learning process more effective for the students. Regular faculty development programs equip them with more educational changes.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Gyan Ganga Institute of Technology and Science is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time and Part Time programmes from streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech, B.Pharma and D.Pharma. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. The fee structure for the Gyan Ganga Institute of Technology and Science programmes is around INR 40,000 to 2,50,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college with good management.

review_content.Placements: Almost 30–50% of students get placed in my course each year. The highest package is around 15 LPA, the average is around 4–5 LPA, and the lowest is 2.5 LPA. The top recruiting companies are TCS, Cognizant, and a few others. Fewer students get internships this year. The top roles offered in my course last year are Data Analyst, Software Engineer, and others.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are quite good. Free Wi-Fi is available in labs, and the overall infrastructure is good. The library is quite good. The quality of food in the canteen is nice. Labs are big with no issues. My library experience is not very good because of a fine. Sports and games happen from time to time, and the AIML department is also good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: A good engineering college in Jabalpur.

review_content.Placements: Almost 45-55 percent of students last year got placed in my course, and the highest package is around 16 LPA, the average is around 6-8 LPA, and the lowest is 2.5 LPA. I think the top recruiting companies are TCS, Accenture, and Cognizant, and fewer students got internships this year, because the skills that companies want are missing in the students. Top roles offered include Data Analyst, Computer Engineers, and many more in our course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are quite good, and the infrastructure is also good. The quality of food in the canteen is also nice, and the labs are big, no problem. The library experience is very good in my case because I can sit there for study by bunking the class, and the sports and games also happen, and the AIML department is also nice. But the CSE department is too awesome.

description: Gyan Ganga Institute of Technology and Science cutoff 2025 was released via MPBE entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General HS category students, the last round cutoff range was between 843253 and 1469093 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 843253, B.Tech in Electronics and Communication Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 1468055.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General HS category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 843253.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General HS category.

Considering the Gyan Ganga Institute of Technology and Science B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025, the top three most competitive specialisations for General HS category students were B.Tech in Electronics and Communication Engineering, B.Tech in Civil Engineering and B.Tech in Electrical Engineering, with last-round closing ranks of 843253, 972008, and 988301, respectively.

reviews.review_heading: Facilities are good, the study in this college is the best. In the case of placement, it's average.
reviews.review_text: The library is present, and the labs are there. No hostel facility, 2 canteens are available. Sports kota is present, but Wi-Fi and solar facilities are not available in my college. Some classrooms have no AC. Very difficult to suffer in the summer season.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with the college infrastructure. Placements are good then but now college.
reviews.review_text: Labs are good, classrooms are also okay. Library condition is well sports and games opportunity is also provided but hostel conditions are not that good. The canteen food is of good quality is also good medical staff present there for the full day. The department is good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with good management.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are quite good. Free Wi-Fi is available in labs, and the overall infrastructure is good. The library is quite good. The quality of food in the canteen is nice. Labs are big with no issues. My library experience is not very good because of a fine. Sports and games happen from time to time, and the AIML department is also good.

reviews.review_heading: A good engineering college in Jabalpur.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are quite good, and the infrastructure is also good. The quality of food in the canteen is also nice, and the labs are big, no problem. The library experience is very good in my case because I can sit there for study by bunking the class, and the sports and games also happen, and the AIML department is also nice. But the CSE department is too awesome.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with a good environment and good internships.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are a little good in our department. The infrastructure is good. The quality of food in the canteen is also nice. Labs are big, and there is no problem. The library experience is also good. Sports and games also happen. The AI ML department is also nice. There are some free Wi-Fi connections also.

reviews.review_heading: Really recommended college in Jabalpur.
reviews.review_text: Lab conditions are good. The library is good, and the services and books offered are fine. Classrooms are fine, the lighting conditions are also good, and the green board is visible very clearly even from the last bench. The canteen is good and the food is edible.

reviews.review_heading: Nice college and good teachers.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good and much helpful. The infrastructure is also good. Department is very nice. The labs are good in space. The library is also much better and sufficient. The quality of food is good. Sports and games are also happen. Mess and medical facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, not many industry centre studies, so it could be better.
reviews.review_text: Our department provides good facilities, including reliable Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, spacious classrooms, and a resourceful library. Hostel, medical, and sports facilities were not available. the canteen offered good quality food for students.

reviews.review_heading: College is good so you can go and take admission in it.
reviews.review_text: There is a wide range of campuses at this college. There are many facilities like good classrooms, washrooms, etc. In the lab, there is an AC, and the maximum Wi-Fi speed is 50 Mbps. The quality of the food is good but not healthy and the price is higher. There is a separate sports ground and games room.

reviews.review_heading: This college can lead to a good future if you try.
reviews.review_text: There are many such facilities at this college which we get such as Wi-Fi facility, lab facility, library facility, sports facility, and games facility. Hostel facility is not available but medical facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: By studying in this college, we can brighten our future.
reviews.review_text: All types of game facilities are available. It has a Wi-Fi facility, labs, and sports facilities. The education system of this department is also very good. There are no technical issues.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good for making a good future.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like a library, Wi-Fi, labs, sports, canteen, and medical facilities are available in this department. A hostel facility is not provided in this college.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college in Jabalpur with a huge campus and great faculty.
reviews.review_text: My college has various facilities and infrastructure. The campus is lush green and is spread over acres. Classrooms are very good, but they don't have Wi-Fi access. The college's library is huge, offering a lot of books with seating space for students. The college also has a spacious canteen, which offers good food.

reviews.review_heading: A very good college with good placements.
reviews.review_text: My college has various facilities, and infrastructure. Buildings are well-maintained and huge. Campus is very huge and filled with greenery, fostering vibrant campus life. Classes are very good, and various labs are available for students. College has its own huge library with spacious seating for students, and a huge canteen which provides good food.

reviews.review_heading: My college is the best when compared to other colleges..
reviews.review_text: The college has a full Wi-Fi campus where Wi-Fi is free for all students. Labs are of good quality, and everything is present in labs. Computer labs are also well-maintained. Classrooms are also good enough. It has a duct cooling system, not air conditioned, but it's okay. The library is also available in college for free to all students. The hostel is acceptable. The quality of food is also good in the mess. The college canteen is the best part of this college, and sports are also good enough. ...

review_content.General: There is no concept of placements as it is a medical college. The next step after graduation is PG entrance preparation for many graduates. Others who applied for jobs did not face any problems. The postgraduation in this college is good.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostels are good with all essential facilities. The canteen is of good quality and accessible. There are 2 messes, and both are good. There are sports like basketball, badminton, table tennis, and swimming. It has a well-equipped gym along with a sauna.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with this college.

review_content.Placements: There is high demand for doctors in our country so students will have a good package as it is on our knowledge as an example, the minimum salary pacakge offered is 14 LPA. All of our seniors get internships, and they do government jobs.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is best. It has Wi-Fi in the library, quality of the mess is good, and the canteen is just near to hostel. It has a big sports complex in which a series of games are available to play. It provides the best hostel facilities, and it feels like living in house. The hospital also provides students treatment free of cost.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied because of the infrastructure, but it does not provide a hostel facility for boys.

review_content.Placements: I am in the 3rd year, so I don't know very well about the placements. I think our college provides good placements. The highest salary package offered to the students is 10.5 LPA, and to achieve this placement, you have to be good at studies and obtain great marks. Many companies like Cipla, Macleods, etc., visit our college for placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is almost good. I will rate 5 stars if I am doing an MBBS course. I am doing a pharmacy course, and the infrastructure is well-maintained but not good compare to MBBS colleges. Classrooms are well-maintained and very hygienic. It contains a projector for teaching and presentation. Labs are quite good, but it is not well-maintained. The library is awesome, and it has a study room too. The hostel facility is available only for girls. Boys live in separate PGs, which is 900-1000 meters far from college.

content.Placements: The students in your class have a strength of 200, after MBBS you don't worry about placements as you will definitely get a job as a medical officer or you can also work as a private practitioner. faqs.answer: A:    Chhattisgarh Institute of Medical Sciences, Bilaspur provides programmes including MD, MS, MBBS in streams such as Medicine & Health Sciences, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Community Medicine, Anatomy, Microbiology, Ophthalmology, Pediatrics, Anesthesiology, Obstetrics & Gynecology, ENT, Biochemistry, General Medicine, Psychiatry.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college for education, but college life is not so good.

review_content.Placements: It's about the medical course, we have to study for 4.5 years and then get an internship in our hospital for one year. In our hospital we get a Rs. 16,000 per month salary for an internship, although it is so hectic and tiring. There is 2 years of bond which you have to serve under the Chhattisgarh government.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not available in our campus and hospital. The infrastructure is not so good, and our campus is also small. The mess food quality is average and not so much effort is given to extracurricular activities. There are 2 years of bond post-MBBS qualification.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Chhattisgarh Institute of Medical Sciences, Bilaspur.

review_content.Placements: There are 180 students in our batch. During the admission, there is a bond according to which students have to do 2 years of rural service in the state as a medical officer otherwise have to pay a fine of 5 lakhs. The average salary offered ranges from Rs 45,000 per month - Rs 50,000 per month. The internships are provided in this college itself.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is old and not good as this college was established in 2001. But the classrooms and laboratories are well-equipped and good in condition. Library has all sufficient books which students may have need for their course. Now coming to hostel, there are problems related to infrastructure. Otherwise all facilities are available in hostel. It provides 24X7 water supply, and no shortage of electricity. Mess food is average, and the canteen is open 24X7. Medical facilities are good and it is at walking distance. There is a presence of hospital in the medical campus itself. There are basketball court, badminton court, and volleyball ground. Cricket and football tournaments occurs occassionally. The CIMS auditorium is very good. The campus is ragging-free.

review_summary.college_name: Chhattisgarh Institute of Medical Sciences, Bilaspur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: It is the best for placements. It lacks infrastructure and faculty members.

content.Placements: Mostly 100% of students get placements after completion of the MBBS course because there is a lack of healthcare professionals in Chhattisgarh. Basically, it is a compulsory bond service of 2 years which is recruited by the Chhattisgarh government. Internships are done in the medical college hospital itself, which is a part of the course. After bond service, we are recruited by any private or government hospitals.
content.Infrastructure: There are in total 19 departments. There are 5 lecture theatres and several demo rooms. Each non-clinical department has its own lab. There is no Wi-Fi. There is an air-conditioned central library for issuing books. Some departments have their own library. It has an air-conditioned study room. Boys hostel is not too good but okay from a hosteller's perspective. There are 2 mess facilities and we can choose to eat from anyone. Bathrooms are not good. There are water coolers for drinking water. There is a badminton court, a playground, a park, a basketball court, and an auditorium.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I have a good experience at this college.

content.Placements: Every passing out batch from this college gets placed at some medical offices. It also gets paid accordingly as per the place with a decent amount. They get employment for at least 2 years minimum. After that, they can also apply to any hospital for the post of JR.
content.Infrastructure: The college is a bit old, so the building is quite not as much as pretty but it is okay for living as per government facilities. E-library is also present and all kinds of books are available in that. Clinical postings are also fruitful and information-related.

Chhattisgarh Institute of Medical Sciences, Bilaspur NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 16810 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Chhattisgarh Institute of Medical Sciences, Bilaspur MBBS cutoff 2025 was 16810 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 17953 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Chhattisgarh Institute of Medical Sciences, Bilaspur NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to various PG-level courses, like MD. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks for multiple categories under the All India quota. For round 4, the closing cutoff for the General AI category ranged from 133394 to 133400. According to this range, the most competitive course is MD. For more details, see the table below.

According to the Chhattisgarh Institute of Medical Sciences, Bilaspur MD cutoff 2025, the most sought-after specialisations for the General AI category were MD in Microbiology, followed by MD in Bio-Chemistry. The round 4 closing ranks for these specialisations were 133394 and 133400, respectively.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best for placements. It lacks infrastructure and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: There are in total 19 departments. There are 5 lecture theatres and several demo rooms. Each non-clinical department has its own lab. There is no Wi-Fi. There is an air-conditioned central library for issuing books. Some departments have their own library. It has an air-conditioned study room. Boys hostel is not too good but okay from a hosteller's perspective. There are 2 mess facilities and we can choose to eat from anyone. Bathrooms are not good. There are water coolers for drinking water. Th...

reviews.review_heading: I have a good experience at this college.
reviews.review_text: The college is a bit old, so the building is quite not as much as pretty but it is okay for living as per government facilities. E-library is also present and all kinds of books are available in that. Clinical postings are also fruitful and information-related.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for education, but college life is not so good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available in our campus and hospital. The infrastructure is not so good, and our campus is also small. The mess food quality is average and not so much effort is given to extracurricular activities. There are 2 years of bond post-MBBS qualification.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Chhattisgarh Institute of Medical Sciences, Bilaspur.
reviews.review_text: The campus is old and not good as this college was established in 2001. But the classrooms and laboratories are well-equipped and good in condition. Library has all sufficient books which students may have need for their course. Now coming to hostel, there are problems related to infrastructure. Otherwise all facilities are available in hostel. It provides 24X7 water supply, and no shortage of electricity. Mess food is average, and the canteen is open 24X7. Medical facilities are good and it is ...

reviews.review_heading: The teachers and placements are good, and the infrastructure is average.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is pretty average because the buildings are getting old. Various facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, separate study halls and rooms, and canteens are available. The quality of food is pretty good, and medical facilities are of the best quality. Sports and other activities are fairly promoted.

reviews.review_heading: It is the leading medical college in Chhattisgarh.
reviews.review_text: CIMS has a 700-bed hospital therefore the clinical exposure is very good for the students. The college campus is spread over around 15-17 acres of land in the heart of the city, therefore availability of shops and goods is very convenient and easy. The library has all the latest books and one can issue one book at a time. Although if students request the librarian they may allow them to take more books in special cases. The college building is very good and all classrooms have air-conditioners a...

reviews.review_heading: This college facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: This college provided a hostel in the first year. Each room has 3 students but from the 2nd year. Only 2 students till internship. From JR ship 1 room have only 1 student. Hostel room is sufficient for 2-3 students with LED light, fan, water cooler, Wi-Fi, and many facilities. A canteen facility is also available, and the study is well maintained. For PG students separate study room is available.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with our college.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides a hostel facility with a fee of Rs. 3,000. Mess charges are Rs. 2,500 per month. In the hostel, our college gives you a bed, light, fan, and cupboard. The cleaning staff regularly cleans your wing. The campus has a sports ground. We also have Wi-Fi and a study room.

A good college with a history of 16 years. Which is partly new when compared to other medical colleges of the country. Second best college of the state. Staffs deprivation is a problem but so does other colleges of country, as all colleges in India except AIIMS faces staff shortage. Faculty wise good enough but not at par. College lacks a canteen but has some of the awesome lecture theaters of the country. Patient load is very much so no PG creates a burden for the Interns doing Internship in a ... Staffs deprivation is a problem but so does other colleges of country, as all colleges in India except AIIMS faces staff shortage. Faculty wise good enough but not at par. College lacks a canteen but has some of the awesome lecture theaters of the country. Patient load is very much so no PG creates a burden for the Interns doing Internship in a ...

reviews.review_heading: My best undergraduate college.
reviews.review_text: There were a total of 19 departments. There were 5 lecture theatres and several demo rooms. Each non-clinical department had its own lab. There was no Wi-Fi. There was an air-conditioned study room. Boys’ hostels were not too good but were okay from a hosteller’s perspective. Generally, 2 students lived in a hostel room. There were 2 messes, and students could choose to eat from either. Bathrooms were not attached to the rooms. A bed, table, and chair were provided by the hostel, but an air cool...

reviews.review_heading: CIMS - The backbone of medical colleges in Chhattisgarh.
reviews.review_text: The college building is very old as it was constructed 20-30 years ago. The classrooms are large enough. The practical labs are also good but they lack some important things like AC and Wi-Fi. Three hostel premises are recently been built and are in good condition (I know very well as I was a hostler). But the food that is served in the mess is not very hygienic. Overall, the college is good.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very good. Small and sweet campus and chaos free.
reviews.review_text: We have separate hostels for boys and girls. There is mess facility in hostels also. The hostels are 5 floored. There is free electricity and water facility and there is also Wi-Fi facility available. The warden sir is also very good person. Hostel is sweet.

reviews.review_heading: Best Medical College of Chhattisgarh
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided in CIMS are numerous, such as the dissection hall, anatomy lab, mortuary, library, large auditorium, cricket ground, and basketball court. The hostel provided by CIMS is very affordable at only 3,500 per year. In each room, three people live together. The main boys' hostel is inside the campus, while for first-year students, the hostel is in Abhilasha Parisar.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good faculty and provides exposure to patients.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not that good. Classrooms have adequate space for 180 students and are fully air-conditioned. Wi-Fi is available on campus and in the hostel. A library and study rooms are provided for students. First-year students are provided with four BHK flats.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with our college. There is good quality of education. It's a very good place.
reviews.review_text: There is a large library where all books can be issued with air conditioning. Students can issue books from any of the peaceful libraries. CCTV cameras are there. Drinking water facilities, personal tables and large tables for group studies are available. There is a canteen.

review_content.Placements: Almost all students are placed after the course. The bonded students are given a government post just after the course, while non-bonded students are also given jobs in various posts. Most commonly as a medical officer in the primary health center.
review_content.Infrastructure: The food quality is average. But overall college infrastructure is good with well-equipped labs and a lecture theatre. Wi-Fi enabled library, centralized AC, and heaters in all rooms. Sports facilities like cricket, volleyball, and table tennis are available.

review_content.Placements: Nice course, mainly, most Science students can try it, and this institute is very good for this course with a 100% placement guarantee. My course is Bachelor of Science, and it is a very good course. It is my final year, and all semester exams are also easy, so you can take admission.

reviews_list.review_title: I have got the best college and it gave me good knowledge.

My college made it easier and supported well.
review_content.Infrastructure: My college has good infrastructure and facilities. The college had best laboratories and good sports centers like badminton, football, cricket ground. And Hostel is very good maintained very well with good hostel guard. And the places are very clean in my college well maintained by college people. Food is very good.

college_info.intro:
FMS Delhi popular programmes are MBA and Executive MBA. It is a two-year, full-time, residential programme, at the end of which the students are awarded an MBA degree. The institute offers strong conceptual fundamentals and several skills that are required to manage business. MBA students learn practical action-based learning experiences. MBA students can seek higher education and work as Finance Managers, Business Analysts, Market Research Analyst, Business Analysts, Investment Banker, and others. Below are some of the programmes offered by FMS Delhi:
For more information about Faculty of Management Studies, University of Delhi check out the below video:

paragraphs: FMS Delhi 2025 admission involves a systematic and multiphase course.Potential students should thoroughly consider eligibility requirements prior to them embarking on the application procedure.Each step is broken down into a substantial form below:
STEP 1: FMS Delhi Application Process

Applicants who are keen to seek the admission in FMS Delhi should begin by filling the on-line form.Application to the institution is done via its official site, which is www.fms.edu. The applicants are required to make sure that they apply and remit the required application fee by the time stated.
STEP 2: Application Screening & Shortlisting

After the application period, candidate screening is done.The screening entails eligibility and selection criteria.The shortlisting of the applicants is done through academic records and other qualifications as mentioned in the eligibility criteria.
STEP 3: Statement of Purpose

Candidates are also required to submit a Statement of Purpose to the FMS Delhi, outlining why they are a fitting candidate for their chosen course. The shortlisting process will take the statement of purpose into consideration to decide a candidate's admission.The step assists in measuring the applicability of the candidates to the EMBA programme.
STEP 4: Personal Interview

Candidates whose applications are shortlisted for admissions are called for a Personal Interview round. In this round, candidates are required to appear before a selection committee which will ask the candidates several questions regarding their personal interests, reasons for choosing the course, their knowledge of the current state of the industry and their plans for the future.
STEP 5: Confirmation of Admissions

Once the interview rounds have taken place, the institution can send an email or whatever other channel is available to the students selected so that they receive confirmation of their admission status.In order to ensure their admission, successful students will be obliged to take the required preparations for admission and as per that, they will be required to handover the required documents in the stipulated deadline, which will confirm the seat in the programme.

FMS fee may include various components such as Tuition Fees, Admission Fees, etc. Candidates have to pay a certain amount of fees at the time of admission. FMS accepts various payment methods, including credit card, debit card, net banking, and UPI. Check below the total tuition fee for top Faculty of Management Studies Delhi courses:

To secure a seat at the university, students must participate in the counselling. FMSseatsare allocated once the candidates have cleared CAT. Students can check out the following table to learn about the total seat intake for some of the popular courses offered at FMS Delhi:

faqs.question: What is the career scope after completing the MBA programme at FMS Delhi?
faqs.answer: Graduates of the FMS Delhi MBA programme are accorded a wide span of job opportunities, such as the Corporate Sector, Entrepreneurship, Government and Public Sector, non-profit organisations, finance and banking.Alternatively, graduates can seek careers in academia, research, overseas markets, industry specialisation or management consultancy.

faqs.answer: Aspiring candidates must possess Bachelors degree minimum in graduation percentage is 50% unreserved category. Whereas Passing will work for SC/ ST candidate as well as 45 percentage cut-off for OBC/NCL, EWS, PWD/CW category. A Candidate in final year graduates might also apply.

faqs.question: What is the lowest cutoff for FMS?
faqs.answer: The lowest cutoff for FMS Delhi is the composite score of 22.422 for PwD 1 till PwD 6 category candidates. The initial process of selection at FMS Delhi is based on CAT scores. courses_data.name: FMS Delhi EMBA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Faculty of Management provides an MBA degree course in Executive and Executive (HCA). To get admission in either of the mentioned courses, students must fulfil the minimum eligibility and selection criteria of the college. As per the college brochure, for MBA Executive a student must have a minimum of five years of experience as an executive or an administrator in a commercial/government establishment/registered organization after passing the Bachelor’s degree examination. FMS Delhi offers an evening programme for professionals looking to acquire managerial skills without leaving work. Candidates must hold an accepted bachelor's degree with the relevant work experience, as FMS requires. The programme helps professionals gain a firm conceptual foundation in management but offers flexibility through electives. The course goes beyond classroom learning, where industry interfaces, guest lectures, and live projects are part of the learning process to gain exposure to real life. Since the course is structured to respond to the changing needs of corporate life, the program prepares executives to effectively play leadership roles and solve intricate business problems.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for the MBA-Executive (Evening Programme) at FMS?
faqs.answer: It is a working professional programme aimed at building managerial capabilities while on the job. The candidates should hold a recognised bachelor's degree with relevant work experience, as required by FMS. The programme allows professionals to acquire a strong conceptual foundation in management with flexibility through electives.

courses_data.name: FMS Delhi PhD Admission 2025
courses_data.description: The PhD programme of FMS provides research opportunities in Operations Management, IT Management, OB & HRM, Marketing, Strategy, Finance, Economics, and Public Policy. A single area of research must be specified by the applicants while submitting a 2,000-word research proposal with clearly outlined objectives, methodology, and anticipated contribution.

faqs.question: What are the major areas of research offered in the PhD programme at FMS?
faqs.answer: FMS provides PhD research work in Operations Management, Decision Science, IT Management, OB & HRM, Marketing, Strategy, Finance, Economics, and Public Policy. One area has to be chosen by the applicants at the application level. The area of choice decides the selection and evaluation process. This maintains focused and related research work.

faqs.question: Can candidates apply for multiple research areas in the FMS PhD programme?
faqs.answer: No, only a single research area in the FMS PhD programme can be applied for by the candidates. Application and selection is strictly for the selected field. Switching the research area after applying is not allowed. This policy is to ensure depth and dedication to the proposed topic.

faqs.question: Does FMS Delhi accept CAT percentile?
faqs.answer: Yes, FMS Delhi accepts CAT score. For all the exams, the institute has released the overall and section-wise FMS Delhi cutoff 2024 for the admission to PGDM on its official page which can be check byclicking here.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in FMS Delhi?
faqs.answer: For FMS Delhi admissions, the applicants need to apply online on the official website and satisfy the requirements of eligibility. The selection into the MBA course is on the basis of CAT scores, along with a personal interview, discussion, and extempore. Shortlisted students also need to satisfy the academic performance standards. Final choice relies on CAT percentile, selection round performance, and overall profile.

faqs.question: Why is FMS Delhi so cheap?
faqs.answer: The two year MBA course at FMS Delhi is significantly lower as compared to other reputed Indian B-schools such as IIM and XLRI and the entire cost of the course amounts to INR 2 lakhs.There are two significant factors in the reduced charges.To begin with, FMS is a department of the publicly-funded University of Delhi and gets government grants to make tuition affordable.Second, the school has a good alumni network that provides the school with financial assistance and assists in financing new infrastructure improvements such as new classrooms and libraries.The information is summarized on the web and could be suggestive.To find out more visit the official site.

faqs.question: Can I get FMS with 95 percentile in CAT?
faqs.answer: Getting in FMS Delhi with 95 percentle in case of General category is not possible but for candidates who aren't from General category still stand a chance. Going as per the past year FMS Delhi cutoff trends candidates seeking admission to FMS Delhi must have an Overall CAT score of98 percentileif they are from the General category,90.07 percentileif they are from the OBC category,82.19 percentileif they are from SC category,58.1 percentileif they are from the ST category,85.9 percentileif they are from PwD category and98 percentileif they are from EWS category.

faqs.question: Can I join FMS without CAT?
faqs.answer: No, candidates cannot get admission in FMS (Faculty of Management Studies), Delhi without CAT (Common Admission Test) score.FMS needs CAT scores in its MBA admission.The selection of the candidates will consist of a personal interview, extempore and discussion after CAT and shortlisting of the candidates by percentile.

placement_data.title: FMS Delhi Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The overall highest and average package recorded during FMS Delhi MBA placements 2025 was I NR 101 LPA and 30.1 LPA . Out of 298 students , 294 students appeared for placements and 271 students were placed . 273 full-time offers and 102 PPOs were made in 2025.
Consulting / General Management emerged as the top recruiting domain wherein 76 full-time offers and 56 PPOs were made during FMS Delhi placements 2025.
The average and median stipend received by MBA students of 2025-27 batch during FMS Delhi summer placements 2025 was INR 3.42 lakh and INR 3.5 lakh .

FMS Delhi placement process is divided into 2 parts, the Final Placement and the Lateral Placement Processes. Students with work experience above 18 months participated in the lateral placement whereas the remaining students participated in the Final Placement process.
FMS Delhi also encourages entrepreneurial culture. In this process, it provides placement holidays to those students that wish to start their own ventures.

average_package.title: FMS Delhi Average Package 2025

faqs.question: What is the average package offered during FMS Delhi placements?
faqs.answer: The overall average package recorded during FMS Delhi placements 2025 was INR 30.1 LPA.

faqs.question: What is the average salary trend during FMS Delhi placements over the past three years?
faqs.answer: The average package offered during FMS Delhi MBA placements 2025 was 30.1 LPA. In 2024 and 2023, MBA average package received was 29.2 LPA and 34.1 LPA.

faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters at FMS Delhi?
faqs.answer: Some of the top recruiters that visited the campus during FMS Delhi placements 2025 included Amazon, Microsoft, McKinsey, Deloitte, Nestle and HSBC Bank.

faqs.question: Why is FMS Delhi MBA not expensive?
faqs.answer: The fee for Master of Business Administration programs at the Faculty of Management Studies, Delhi is as low as INR 2 lakh for the General category candidates. The reason for the Faculty of Management Studies, Delhi fees being so low is that it is a University of Delhi department and has a highly subsidised fee structure from the UGC (University Grants Commission). Students belonging to the PwD category shall be exempted from the payment of all fees except for the fee of admission and issuing of the identity card. Also, the semester fee for other categories such as Schedule Caste, Schedule Tribe, or Other Backward Classes is subject to revision and is notified to the candidates before the beginning of the academic session.

reviews.review_heading: Reviewing activities at Faculty of Management Studies, University of Delhi.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in my colleges are better than the other colleges. The labs are very beautiful and the classrooms are kept clean. The library has a really silent environment. The hostel quality is good compared to the other colleges.

reviews.review_heading: FMS is one of the top B-schools in the country with the aim for never ending progress.
reviews.review_text: The campus is a part of the Delhi University North campus infrastructure and has high-tech classrooms. The campus is equipped with super-fast central Wi-Fi. FMS has its own library within the campus and students can also access the DU library which has a great repository. Apart from the on campus facilities, the college has access to the DU stadium facilities for sports and it also has partnerships with other colleges.

reviews.review_heading: FMS is always been one among the top 5 B-Schools in India.
reviews.review_text: FMS Delhi is well-equipped with modern facilities and infrastructure to support the learning and research needs of its students. The campus is equipped with Wi-Fi, a library, seminar hall, digital classrooms, and computer labs. The library is well stocked with books, journals, and other resources to support the academic programs of the B-School. We also have additional facilities of Delhi University that can be used for academic purposes. We do not have any separate hostel for FMS students, but ...

reviews.review_heading: 100% of the batch was placed.
reviews.review_text: FMS is part of the University of Delhi, we have access to every utility from Delhi University such as their elaborate online library to the various utility buildings and facilities. Our college has Wi-Fi access and a great canteen to cater to your food requirements. We have our own library as well as computer rooms, Discussions Rooms, Skype Room, and Halls for Seminars. We have a dedicated Sports Room and a small lawn good for games like Racket, Badminton and other indoor games as well. FMS unfo...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Faculty of Management Studies, University of Delhi.
reviews.review_text: FMS Delhi doesn't have hostel facilities. A student generally opts for flats near campus. But it has a great social life with talented peers from across India. There are cultural and sports events conducted every month. The college has a library, basketball court, and other sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: FMS - My Dreams Came True.
reviews.review_text: Being a government university, it lacks a lavish campus as other top B schools have and the hostel is allotted to very few students since it is common for Delhi university. Students usually stay in flats in nearby areas and thus make their college life fun and full of new experiences. Being located in Delhi, there are a lot of fun activities to do for the students. There is a big library at the college campus and fun activities include celebrating various occasions, the great section war, sports...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Faculty of Management Studies, University of Delhi.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi was available on the premises, and the speed of Wi-Fi was also fine. Laboratories, classrooms, and library were regularly clean and maintained. The quality of food at the college was also fine, and they prepare different food on different days, and special food on special occasions.

reviews.review_heading: It is the top B school not just with the point of ROI but learnings too.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not as lavish as other top B schools. The canteen is quite good, and it serves a delicious variety of eatables. Hostels are not provided, but all students live nearby the college in flats which make it a lot of fun.

reviews.review_heading: It is indeed "Building of Red Dreams.
reviews.review_text: FMS doesn't provide hostel facilities and due to online MBA this time, I couldn't visit the library or classrooms but as per the knowledge I have, they are well maintained and ventilated. Wi-Fi and other basic facilities like sanitation, drinking water is available with utmost hygiene.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college under business management.
reviews.review_text: Hostel accommodation facilities are available to students of the full-time MBA programme in postgraduate hostels of University of Delhi. Hostels are equipped with basic amenities like a water purifier, common room, recreation room, mess, laundry services, security and surveillance system, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because faculty was excellent, infrastructure and facilities were very good.
reviews.review_text: All necessary facilities and infrastructure are available, good classrooms, nice library, playground canteen, etc. Good quality food is available in the canteen and all sports facilities. It Delhi University college and DU is a very good name and facility to improve student personalities.

reviews.review_heading: Review of FMS - Faculty of Management Studies, Delhi University.
reviews.review_text: FMS comprises of two lecture halls, around 8 to 10 classrooms, a decent size seminar hall, a canteen and a library. While IIM institutes possess a top-notch infrastructure and facilities which are up to their standards and reputation, and those facilities include art auditoriums, hostels, huge classrooms, seminar halls, open spaces and libraries. The strength of a batch at FMS, Delhi is less than half of the strength of the IIM institutes. A low batch strength at FMS can pose to have more advant...

reviews.review_heading: Amazing experience and the best RoI any B school can have.
reviews.review_text: Faculty of Management Studies, University of Delhi is located in the heart of North Campus. There are no hostels but we do have access to some DU hostels. It is a close knit campus with 220 students in a batch so we get all the advantages of a small batch size as compared to other B-schools.

reviews.review_heading: Good growth at this college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available 24 hrs. Library is good and very peaceful. Classroom are totally air conditioned. Hostels are out of the college campus. Food is quite good in quality. Sports ground are not very big but all the facility are available very good to live.

reviews.review_heading: Best in class learning with ROI.
reviews.review_text: - Decent facilities were present across the college for the entire batch. FMS Students have only 20 students staying in a hostel with the rest spread across Rental Flats, PGs and localities. The rooms, mess food were decent for the likes of a hostel but students used to most spend time at college where canteen was good. FMS, standalone doesn't have a sports facility/ complex. By now, there are baseball courts, Dance Rooms and sports ground of North Delhi campus. Additionally, South Campus of FMS...

The industry exposure is provided by field studies and direct interaction with the industrialists to translate theoretical knowledge into real-life practice. FMS is designed to empower executives to resolve complex business problems. This empowers them to lead and innovate in volatile business environments.
