paragraphs: The fee for Master of Business Administration programs at the Faculty of Management Studies, Delhi is as low as INR 2 lakh for the General category candidates. The reason for the Faculty of Management Studies, Delhi fees being so low is that it is a University of Delhi department and has a highly subsidised fee structure from the UGC (University Grants Commission). Students belonging to the PwD category shall be exempted from the payment of all fees except for the fee of admission and issuing of the identity card. Also, the semester fee for other categories such as Schedule Caste, Schedule Tribe, or Other Backward Classes is subject to revision and is notified to the candidates before the beginning of the academic session.

The total tuition fee for the MBA programme for the two-year MBA programme at FMS Delhi is INR 2 lakh. This fee only includes the cost of tuition for the MBA programme and does not consists of the mess fee or the hostel fee. The fee is taken from unofficial sources and hence, is indicative. To apply fo the MBA programme at FMS Delhi candidates need to visit the official website and pay INR 1,000 for the application fee.

highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Government Medical College, Thrissur:

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Government Medical College, Thrissur.

review_content.Placements: Education is almost free. About 175 students can take admission here. All of them will get jobs. It is a top college in Kerala. There will be no tension about going jobless. We should write the NEET exam and have a good score to get admission.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college and course offer good education facilities and infrastructure. There is Wi-Fi in hostel. Labs are neat and clean and help to practice a lot. Classrooms are good with proper facilities. the library is useful for studying; all students go to the library for reference.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with academics, campus life, and infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Students got placements through counseling which is conducted by MCC. After 4 years of the MBBS course, every student has to do one year of internship in the hospital.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good. A new building has been built with all departments. There is a central library and reading room with a strong Wi-Fi connection. Classrooms are spacious with great ventilation. Our canteen is not much spacious. We have an indoor stadium for basketball and badminton. The hostel facilities are average.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Journey and rise of a doctor.

review_content.Placements: I think that more than our direct senior two batches, we were very good at academics. Many of my friends and batchmates were the ones in top ranks of entrance exams. They created a high competition for other batchmates and succeeded in bringing everyone to a top level of academics.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel was maintained professionally. It has many blocks and two buildings for boys and many buildings for girls hostel. Each block has a 5g WIFI connection. Mess was good and clean. They cleaned and maintained it hygienically. And seniors were the mess secretaries. So they took care of it. The food and stuffs were great.

review_summary.college_name: Government Medical College, Thrissur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: My medical education

content.Placements: In our batch, there are no placement opportunities. Instead, there is an internship. We get to do one year of internship in our hospital itself. During this period, we will be given a stipend of about twenty-five thousand. We will be posted in different departments such as medicine, orthopedics, pediatrics, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Our college is a well-developed college with fine infrastructure. Our classes have centralized AC. We have many additional buildings such as a gym, central lab, indoor stadium, and many auditoriums, etc. I'm staying in a government hostel, and in my hostel room, there are four members. The hostel mess is of high quality.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Government Medical College, Thrissur.

content.Placements: We have a class strength of 175 students. The total fees are 26,630 rupees per year. This includes all the tuition fees, special fees, and van fees. Scholarships are available for various categories like OBC, SC, and ST. Also, after 4 years of the course, we have a 1-year internship.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good. They provide a separate academic block, a well-filled library along with a study hall. Classrooms are air-conditioned and provided with smart class facilities. We have a government hostel here with 3 persons per room and a mess with a good menu and affordable rates.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of Government Medical College, Thrissur.

content.Placements: Education is almost free. About 175 students can take admission here. All of them will get jobs. It is a top college in Kerala. There will be no tension about going jobless. We should write the NEET exam and have a good score to get admission.
content.Infrastructure: The college and course offer good education facilities and infrastructure. There is Wi-Fi in hostel. Labs are neat and clean and help to practice a lot. Classrooms are good with proper facilities. the library is useful for studying; all students go to the library for reference.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with academics, campus life, and infrastructure.

content.Placements: Students got placements through counseling which is conducted by MCC. After 4 years of the MBBS course, every student has to do one year of internship in the hospital.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good. A new building has been built with all departments. There is a central library and reading room with a strong Wi-Fi connection. Classrooms are spacious with great ventilation. Our canteen is not much spacious. We have an indoor stadium for basketball and badminton. The hostel facilities are average.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Journey and rise of a doctor.

content.Placements: I think that more than our direct senior two batches, we were very good at academics. Many of my friends and batchmates were the ones in top ranks of entrance exams. They created a high competition for other batchmates and succeeded in bringing everyone to a top level of academics.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel was maintained professionally. It has many blocks and two buildings for boys and many buildings for girls hostel. Each block has a 5g WIFI connection. Mess was good and clean. They cleaned and maintained it hygienically. And seniors were the mess secretaries. So they took care of it. The food and stuffs were great.

description: Government Medical College, Thrissur cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Government Medical College, Thrissur NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 7547 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Government Medical College, Thrissur MBBS cutoff 2025 was 7547 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 8155 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Government Medical College, Thrissur accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

Government Medical College, Thrissur NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to various PG-level courses, like MD. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks for multiple categories under the All India quota. For round 4, the closing cutoff for the General AI category was 72293. According to this range, the most competitive course is MD. For more details, see the table below.

According to the Government Medical College, Thrissur MD cutoff 2025, the most sought-after specialisation for the General AI category was MD in Pharmacology. The round 4 closing rank for this specialisation was 72293.
Students can refer to the table below to know NEET PG cutoffs across different categories, courses, and years.
Students who appeared for the NEET PG exam 2025 can refer to the table below to view the NEET PG Round 1 cutoff list. They can also download the results for later use.

Government Medical College, Thrissur NEET SS Cutoff 2024 was released for the concluding round in the form of ranks for admission to DM, M.Ch. courses across multiple specialisations. The cutoff was released for various categories belonging to the AI quota.

While for the last round, the closing rank was 784 wherein DM in Cardiology proved to be the most sought-after in the General AI category. Students can check the first and last round closing ranks from the table provided below.

In this section, candidates can find out the category-wise NEET SS cutoff 2024 and 2023. In 2024, for the General AI quota, the NEET SS cutoff was closed at 784 for DM in Cardiology. In 2023, the same specialisation cutoff was capped at 1692.
For more in-depth details for the previous year cutoffs, please refer to the table provided below and make use of the filters available to refine your search on the basis of rounds and category.
Students can view or download the round and year-wise consolidated NEET SS cutoff PDFs for Government Medical College, Thrissur. This will help students to understand the year-wise cutoff trends.

Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.Some job profiles are listed here:Brand ManagerAccount ManagerInternational Business ManagerMarketing ExecutiveBusiness Technical ConsultantAll the best.

answer.text: Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

lists: Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

review_summary.college_name: School of Business Management Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBA (Dual Specialization) in Marketing - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is a perfect college for placement and other facilities.

content.Placements: Almost 40% of students were placed with different organizations during campus placements. The highest package is 13.96 LPA from Zaro Education, and the average is approximately 4 LPA. The top is Zaro Education. Almost 80% of students got internships from the campus itself. The top role offered from an MBA is in sales.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and the course are fantastic. It is a good place to visit and spend time, providing internet for every individual with a unique ID and password. Labs are all well-equipped and have high-end computers, with smart TVs in class and fully air-conditioned inside the building. The hostel is not on the campus. It usually gives students different hostels that are not under the college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelors in Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the college is good for medical courses, they have various labs and equipment too.

content.Placements: In the case of an internship in medical professions, it is directly based on your skills. Though you can get an internship at the NIIMS hospital. It's our college's hospital otherwise, you can also get internships in other hospitals. They have good relations with other hospitals, so you can get internships there easily.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is awesome. You can also see on Google by typing NIU, you will get all the photos there. In NIU, some movie scenes and music videos are also done due to better infrastructure. While the campus is Wi-Fi connected, labs are also good, you can have here anatomy lab, physiology lab, biochemistry labs, etc. Classrooms have digital boards and aesthetic classes. The library is also nice. The college doesn't have its own hostel, they have partnerships with hostels, but it is not good. So I prefer not to take a hostel, instead, you can take a PG.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Retail Operations - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Overall the college is the best.

content.Placements: About 76% of students get placement in my course. The highest package offered is 36 lacs per annum, and the lowest is about 12 lacs per annum. Recruitment companies include Google, Uncodemy, etc. 97% of students get internships in big companies like Google, Nike, McDonald's, etc., especially in managerial roles.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure of our college are very nice and attractive. The regular classes and the best teachers are provided. The facilities and infrastructure available in the hostel are very good. The availability of services, food, transportation, Wi-Fi, library, classrooms, and medical emergency support is easy.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Retail Operations - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: In my opinion, I didn't prefer to take admission to this college.

content.Placements: More than 20% of students are placed from our course. The highest and the lowest package offered in our course is around 2.5 LPA. Small companies are recruiting from my course. Around 50% of students got internships. Marketing roles are offered in my course.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are very good. Fully AC classrooms and Wi-Fi all are working. Library is also good. Hostel facilities are not bad, but hostel is out of campus, and the hostel location is not good. Food quality is average. Sports and games are not bad.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Retail Operations - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: This college is not for placements. It is for campus life and infrastructure is amazing.

content.Placements: About 40% of students got placed in this course. The average package offered in this course ranges from 2 LPA to 3 LPA. I think only 20% of students got internships in companies like Bharat Petroleum, Younity, etc. No roles are offered in this course.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is amazing in my course. Every facility is available at this college. Wi-Fi is available and classrooms are also available. Library is available. The quality of food available in the mess is average. Canteen food is good. Medical facility is good. Sports and games are held every 6 months.

faqs.question: Does NIU SBM accept CUET-PG?
faqs.answer: School of Business Management Noida International University offers various PG courses such as MBA and MCom. Admissions to these courses is based on the performance of candidates in entrance exams such as the CUET-PG. The institute does accept the CUET-PG for courses that include the talked about test in their selection criteria.Candidates can apply to the PG courses through other entrance exams as well such as CAT and MAT.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at Noida International University SBM?
faqs.answer: No, there is no provision for direct admission at Noida International University SBM. Candidates must go through an entrance test conducted by the Noida International University or other national level; entrance exams.The institute is now accepting applications for admission to its various programs, and applications can be submitted both online and offline. The eligibility criteria might vary depending on the programme and programme level candidates whish to apply for.

faqs.question: What are the final steps after getting selected for B.Com at the School of Business Management (NIU)?
faqs.answer: After being shortlisted for admission to the BCom course at the School of Business Management (NIU) candidates must complete the final steps, which include document verification, counseling, and payment of the course fee. The total tuition fee is valued at INR 2.5 Lakh.

reviews.review_heading: Review of School of Business Management, Noida International University.

review_summary.college_name: Ruxmaniben Deepchand Gardi Medical College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The college is everything you want.

content.Placements: Approximately 700-800 students are doing this course, a 60-70k package. They teach about the doctors' occupation, how to treat patients with their concerns, learn about multiple diseases which is harmful for our community, learning about ethics and manners that every doctor must have.
content.Infrastructure: There is a library in my college and it is very good for studying. There are different labs in different departments where we can perform many practicals and learn their advantages. Hostel facilities are good, food in the mess is also good and tasty. There occurs an annual event in which we can play games and enjoy ourselves.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: My college is good enough to become a doctor.

content.Placements: I'm pursuing MBBS from RD Gardi Medical College, Ujjain. I got admission in 2023 based on my NEET score. As part of the course, we have to do a one-year internship at the college's hospital, and those who have signed bonds are required to do rural service for one or two years.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good infrastructure, with proper labs for practicals and good medical facilities. Each department teaches students well. The quality of the hostel is good, and a variety of food is prepared every day.
content.Faculty: The professors are well-qualified and trained in their subjects. We have two sessionals, one pre-university exam, and one university exam. The passing percentage for each year is 50% in each subject to be promoted to the next year.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Ruxmaniben Deepchand Gardi Medical College.
reviews.review_text: RDGMC is the oldest and first established semi-private medical college in Madhya Pradesh. The infrastructure and campus are quite old, but the resources are quite adequate. A three-storied air-conditioned library is available at the college. Classrooms are huge and spacious. The quality of hostels and canteens is not good. Students prefer to live in guest houses rather than hostels. The quality of the food is not good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good academically but the infrastructure is average.
reviews.review_text: Lecture theatres are good but it has no air-conditioning. Wi-Fi is not available on campus. Hostels are in miserable conditions below the living standards of medical students. There is no switchboard provided. Food available in the mess is good. Library is good but has no air conditioning which makes this very difficult to study in summer time.

reviews.review_heading: My overall experience in the college was very good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good from the outside. The campus is enormous. However, the hostels are a bit on the lower side. They do need a lot of improvement. The mess and canteens are really good. Hospital and labs are good. The library is huge and spacious with lots of books.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good academics and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: We have labs, classrooms, badminton, playground, cricket playground, boys hostel, girls hostel, and a canteen. Girls hostel is fine. The fee charges are Rs. 12,000 per year. It is perfect but I heard that boys' hostel is not in good condition. There is no Wi-Fi. The overall infrastructure of our college is good. There is greenery all around.

reviews.review_heading: It is value for money and perfect college for people who want to gain good clinical knowledge.
reviews.review_text: There is one building for medical college. There are a total of 4 lecture halls and an auditorium. It is a 4-floor building, and the examination hall is on the top floor. The anatomy department is very well furnished. But there is no Wi-Fi connection for students, only for teachers. There is a very bad network coverage area. The library is good. It is of 3 floors, but 3rd is not in use because the students are less.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has value for money and has a good infrastructure and a lot of patient exposure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good here. There is one college building, which is sprawled over 5 floors. There are 5-6 lecture theatres, a canteen and a library nearby. There is no Wi-Fi facility. However, the hostel is situated in the nearby vicinity. There is an attached hospital named CRGH hospital, which gives maximum treatment facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good faculty members with great clinical exposure.
reviews.review_text: Quality of the food served is average. But washrooms are not at a proper condition. The library is good. Wi-Fi connection is not available here. The hostel facility is good. In each room, there are 2 students, and it may be senior-junior or maybe batchmates. A mess is in good condition. Food served to the students is hygienic. There is a study room in the hostel, and also for late-night studying.

reviews.review_heading: Teaching and other facilities are quite good here.
reviews.review_text: Labs are good, and it provides sufficient equipment to all students. The infrastructure of our college is clean, and it is filled with varieties of plants. Our college is well-maintained. Quality of food served in the hostel is good. Our college provides us with space to play sports on campus.

reviews_list.review_title: It is one of the good medical colleges among Chennai's private medical colleges.

review_content.Placements: Almost all of the students get placed. Most of them pursue higher studies and few others get placements as JR. Usually, for JRs, the average salary offered is Rs 49,000. Students are joining top government medical colleges for their post-graduation. Many have been worked as covid warriors.
review_content.Infrastructure: It has a well-built college, hospital, and hostel building. All necessary infrastructure is available for students, but still can be improved. Hostel infrastructure is far better than many other top colleges in Chennai. Each person has a room with attached washrooms, and all necessary facilities are available.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Happy to be here as a student.

review_content.Placements: 150 students placed every year. Average salary for teaching staffs or junior residents are about 50 thousand per month. The under graduates studied here are placed in aims and M.M.C. like colleges for post graduation through NEET. Education is very much a highlight here. And we get more chance for watching surgeries and attending patients.
review_content.Infrastructure: The labs has all the instruments required for UG students and even more that is required for research purposes. More research activities are also being conducted. Classrooms are vast with good audio and video displays with centralised AC. Hostel rooms are very big which is very much enough for one to live in with attached restrooms. Mess food is somewhat okay. We get non veg twice a week. Sports we have football and cricket and volleyball for boys and Throwball and koko for girls.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has an average infrastructure, excellent professors and HODs and offers knowledge.

review_content.Placements: Students got admission here through the counselling conducted by the state government based on the NEET marks. Our college is affiliated to Dr. MGR Medical University, and the fee for students who got admission through government quota is 4.5 LPA-6 LPA. For management quota, the fee is 12.5 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has an average infrastructure, and the campus is sprawled over 7 floors. Our college consists of a library, canteen, study hall and animal house, and a hospital is situated nearby the college. The hospital provides treatment at very less cost. The hospital consists of various departments and also an operation theatre.

Students can choose these programs to launch their careers in the Medicine & Health Sciences field. Sri Muthukumaran Medical College is known for its dedicated and experienced faculty members committed to delivering these courses. Sri Muthukumaran Medical College has received an impressive review rating of 3.6 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has earned ratings of 3.5 for Campus Life, 4.25 for Placements, 4 for Faculty, and 2.75 for Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Muthukumaran Medical College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I would recommend joining this college.

content.Infrastructure: Our college has been constructed recently. All labs and libraries are old. New hostel buildings are under construction.
content.Faculty: Our teachers are good. Their teaching quality is good, and we can gain knowledge from them. The faculty and student ratio is good.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is one of the good medical colleges among Chennai's private medical colleges.

content.Placements: Almost all of the students get placed. Most of them pursue higher studies and few others get placements as JR. Usually, for JRs, the average salary offered is Rs 49,000. Students are joining top government medical colleges for their post-graduation. Many have been worked as covid warriors.
content.Infrastructure: It has a well-built college, hospital, and hostel building. All necessary infrastructure is available for students, but still can be improved. Hostel infrastructure is far better than many other top colleges in Chennai. Each person has a room with attached washrooms, and all necessary facilities are available.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Happy to be here as a student.

content.Placements: 150 students placed every year. Average salary for teaching staffs or junior residents are about 50 thousand per month. The under graduates studied here are placed in aims and M.M.C. like colleges for post graduation through NEET. Education is very much a highlight here. And we get more chance for watching surgeries and attending patients.
content.Infrastructure: The labs has all the instruments required for UG students and even more that is required for research purposes. More research activities are also being conducted. Classrooms are vast with good audio and video displays with centralised AC. Hostel rooms are very big which is very much enough for one to live in with attached restrooms. Mess food is somewhat okay. We get non veg twice a week. Sports we have football and cricket and volleyball for boys and Throwball and koko for girls.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college has an average infrastructure, excellent professors and HODs and offers knowledge.

content.Placements: Students got admission here through the counselling conducted by the state government based on the NEET marks. Our college is affiliated to Dr. MGR Medical University, and the fee for students who got admission through government quota is 4.5 LPA-6 LPA. For management quota, the fee is 12.5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has an average infrastructure, and the campus is sprawled over 7 floors. Our college consists of a library, canteen, study hall and animal house, and a hospital is situated nearby the college. The hospital provides treatment at very less cost. The hospital consists of various departments and also an operation theatre.

faqs.answer: A:    Depending on the particular degree you're interested in, Sankalchand Patel University (SPU) accepts scores from a variety of entrance tests for admission to its undergraduate and graduate programmes. GUJCET, SPU-CET, JEE Main, and so on. SPU may also take into account test results from other programmes, such as the NEET for pharmacy (B.Pharma), CAT for MBA (MBA), CLAT for law (LL.B.), etc. Exam results from the GATE, CAT, GMAT, GRE, or university-specific entrance tests are required for the majority of postgraduate programmes, including M.Tech, M.Pharma, M.Sc., MBA, and so on.For some programmes, such as M.Tech and M.Sc., SPU administers its own postgraduate entrance test (SPU-PET). SPU provides minimal eligibility requirements for each programme, such as a needed percentage in Class 12th or qualifying scores in prior admission tests, in addition to entrance exam results. The number of candidates, exam difficulty, and available seats are some of the elements that affect the cut-off scores for each programme and entrance exam.For up-to-date deadline information, visit the university website or get in touch with the admissions department.
faqs.question: What entrance exam scores are accepted by Sankalchand Patel University for admission?

faqs.answer: A:    To get into SPU for a MTech course, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the university. Students must pass BE/BTech or equivalent examination with a minimum of 50% for the General Category and 45% aggregate for SC/ST/SEBC. Sankalchand Patel University offers full-time M.Tech courses of two years' duration. Students can get into this course based on a valid GATE exam score/ACPC Admission. Apart from the selection criteria, students must pass BE/BTech (common eligibility).
faqs.question: What percentage is required for admission to M.Tech at Sankalchand Patel University?

faqs.answer: A:    No, candidates cannot join Sankalchand Patel University without an entrance exam.  The university offers courses, such as MBBS, BTech, BPharma, MBA, etc., at the UG and PG level. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the university also offers doctorate and Diploma courses. The university also accepts national-level entrance exams like GATE, NEET, NEET MDS, etc. for admission to specific courses. Sankalchand Patel University offers 20 courses at the UG and PG levels in multiple streams like Arts, Business & Management, Engineering, Pharmacy, etc.
faqs.question: Can I get admission to various courses at Sankalchand Patel University without appearing in any entrance exam?

faqs.answer: A:    To secure admission to the Sankalchand Patel University BBA programme, candidates need to have passed their Class 12 in any stream from a recognised board. Candidates should ensure that they fulfill the required eligibility criteria prior to applying. Candidates are also required to provide supporting documents to establish their eligibility. In order to confirm their seat, they need to pay the relevant course fee.

overview_faqs.answer: Yes, BTech course is available at Sankalchand Patel University. The university offers BTech courses at the UG level. Candidate must meet the eligibility criteria to enroll for BTech course admission set by the college. Aspirants must pass Class 12 with a 45% aggregate (PCM), 40% for SC, ST, SEBC. SPU admission process is entrance-based.

overview_faqs.question: Is M.Tech expensive at Sankalchand Patel University?
overview_faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for Sankalchand Patel University is ranges between INR 2 lakh-INR 2.6 lakh. This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Students opting for hostel facility have to pay other fee components such as hostel rent, mess bill, establishment charges, etc. Students need to pay the fee only in the online mode.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for UG courses at Sankalchand Patel University?
overview_faqs.answer: Fee schedules for various programmes vary. In comparison to B.A. programmes, B.Tech programmes may cost more. A separate tuition price may apply to each of the many groups for which SPU reserves seats, such as General, SC/ST, OBC, etc. Fees for B.Tech programmes range from INR 41,000 to INR 80,000 for general category candidates. However, the charge will drop from INR 21,000 to INR 41,000 for the SC/ST category. About INR 58,000 for general category applicants and INR 29,000 for SC/ST applicants will be the cost for B.Pharma.There will be a fee of around INR 48,000 for SC/ST applicants and INR 95,000 for general applicants for BBA.For BCA, the general category price will be approximately INR 45,000, while the SC/ST category fee would be INR 22,000. The additional hostel fees for staying on campus can cost anything from INR 15,000 to INR 25,000 per semester. Meal costs, which range from INR 12,000 to INR 18,000 per semester, are subject to change based on the plan you select.

review_summary.college_name: Sankalchand Patel University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Campus life is vibrant with cultural and technical fests.

content.Placements: Around 70% of students from AI & this get placed every year. The highest package offered is around 12 LPA, the average package offered is 4 to 6 LPA, and the lowest package offered is 3 LPA. Top recruiters include TCS, Wipro, Infosys, and Capgemini. Internships are offered in firms like TCS iON and AI/ML startups. Roles include Data Analyst, AI Engineer, Software Developer, and ML Engineer. Placement training and mock interviews help improve results.
content.Infrastructure: The campus has modern labs, Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, and a rich library. AI labs are equipped with the latest software and high end systems. The hostel has spacious rooms with Wi-Fi and 24/7 security. Food in the mess is decent with hygienic preparation. Medical facilities, sports, and a gym are available for students. Overall, infrastructure supports both academics and personal growth.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: A decent start, but it needs improvement.

content.Placements: Placement opportunities are limited especially for core branches. Only a few companies visit the campus and the packages offered are mostly low. Students are good and almost all receive placement training but it's not very impactful in terms of real results.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good, but non-AC rooms and labs are also adequate. Classes are clean, and the service provided at facilities is okay. The college is clean, and overall, it's good. I'd give it 5 stars.
content.Faculty: Teachers are good and powerful, and they provide good learning experiences. Some professors are helpful and experienced, while others are less engaging or hard to approach. Teaching methods are mostly theory-based with a limited focus on overall practical knowledge.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: For me, the placements are decent, but faculty or infrastructure is good. The campus is also good.

content.Placements: Placements are decent in our college. Only 20-30% of students get good placements through college. So, I would rate it three stars only. Students got placed with good packages. Many students got internships from college in good companies. The faculty also helps in placement training.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good infrastructure facilities, like new labs and an auditorium. The hostel infrastructure is not good enough, but they are renovating it. Our college campus is way better than our college because we have all right to do whatever we want to do.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of Sankalchand Patel College of Engineering, Gujrat.

content.Placements: Placements are decent in our college. Only 20%-30% of students get good placements through college. So I would rate three stars only. Students got placed with good packages. Many students got internships from my course in good companies.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure of my department and college are very good and our college work very hard on it for good attention from students for new admission. We have free Wi-Fi, and good and clean labs with all machines. We also have library and classrooms.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (Feb 24)- Diploma in Information and Communication Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is a very good college with amazing infrastructure.

content.Placements: Up to 60% of our college allowed people to study in our college. Our college provides the highest package of Rs. 1,00,000. The lowest is Rs. 12,000. It is a very good college. Teachers are very helpful in every situation. They help us a lot.
content.Infrastructure: We have a computer in every lab. They provide us with internet too. We have a good canteen which provides us unlimited full dishes for Rs. 70. In the canteen, vada pav, dosa, bhel, bhaji pav, cold drinks, water bottles, etc., are present. Our canteen has a good design for winter and summer like providing AC and fans in summer.

paragraphs: Sankalchand Patel University admissionsare mainly entrance-based. The admission process at the university requires students to register at the website of the university. Interested students can follow the steps below to completeSankalchand Patel University admission process:
SPU Application Process

The mode of application is online/offline. Students must apply for JEE Main for BTech, CMAT for MBA etc., for admission to the various courses. They can fill out the application form on the university's official website.

The university considers various entrance exam scores such as GATE, NEET, etc for admission to the MTech, MBBS among courses. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for final selection.
Merit List and Admission Confirmation

After the release ofSankalchand Patel University cutoff, aspirants with scores equal or above the cutoff are offered seats. The university also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay the Sankalchand Patel University fee to confirm their seats in the university.

SPU feesmay include various components such as tuition fees, admission fees, caution deposits, etc. Candidates have to pay a certain amount of fees at the time of admission. The table below mentions the Sankalchand Patel University fees for various UG & PG courses:
Note: This amount is taken from official sources and can change.

placement_data.title: Sankalchand Patel University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The University has not disclosed 2025 placement statistics. As per the NIRF report 2025 released by the University, the median package offered during UG 3-year and UG 4-year placements 2024 stood at INR 3.80 LPA and INR 7.40 LPA , respectively. The median package recorded during Sankalchand Patel University placements 2024 was INR 8.42 LPA . Further, the median package offered during Sankalchand Patel University PG 2-year and PG 3-year placements 2024 stood at INR 10.98 LPA and INR 9.89 LPA , respectively.

A separate tuition price may apply to each of the many groups for which SPU reserves seats, such as General, SC/ST, OBC, etc. Fees for B.Tech programmes range from INR 41,000 to INR 80,000 for general category candidates. However, the charge will drop from INR 21,000 to INR 41,000 for the SC/ST category. About INR 58,000 for general category applicants and INR 29,000 for SC/ST applicants will be the cost for B.Pharma. There will be a fee of around INR 48,000 for SC/ST applicants and INR 95,000 for general applicants for BBA.For BCA, the general category price will be approximately INR 45,000, while the SC/ST category fee would be INR 22,000. The additional hostel fees for staying on campus can cost anything from INR 15,000 to INR 25,000 per semester. Meal costs, which range from INR 12,000 to INR 18,000 per semester, are subject to change based on the plan you select.

Sankalchand Patel University has received strong ranks by the Outlook under the 'Medical Universities (Private)' category. qs_world.description:
Sankalchand Patel University has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by QS World University Rankings 2026, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. In the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have descended when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, Sankalchand Patel University fell 400 ranks to #1301 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
The institute has demonstrated a decreasing trend in the 'Southern Asia' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2026, Sankalchand Patel University fell 137 ranks to #429 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Sankalchand Patel College of EngineeringReviewed on 24 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Campus life is vibrant with cultural and technical fests.
reviews.review_text: The campus has modern labs, Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, and a rich library. AI labs are equipped with the latest software and high end systems. The hostel has spacious rooms with Wi-Fi and 24/7 security. Food in the mess is decent with hygienic preparation. Medical facilities, sports, and a gym are available for students. Overall, infrastructure supports both academics and personal growth.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Sankalchand Patel College of EngineeringReviewed on 23 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: A decent start, but it needs improvement.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, but non-AC rooms and labs are also adequate. Classes are clean, and the service provided at facilities is okay. The college is clean, and overall, it's good. I'd give it 5 stars.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Sankalchand Patel College of EngineeringReviewed on 23 Mar 2025)
reviews.review_heading: For me, the placements are decent, but faculty or infrastructure is good. The campus is also good.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure facilities, like new labs and an auditorium. The hostel infrastructure is not good enough, but they are renovating it. Our college campus is way better than our college because we have all right to do whatever we want to do.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Sankalchand Patel College of EngineeringReviewed on 27 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Sankalchand Patel College of Engineering, Gujrat.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of my department and college are very good and our college work very hard on it for good attention from students for new admission. We have free Wi-Fi, and good and clean labs with all machines. We also have library and classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college with amazing infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: We have a computer in every lab. They provide us with internet too. We have a good canteen which provides us unlimited full dishes for Rs. 70. In the canteen, vada pav, dosa, bhel, bhaji pav, cold drinks, water bottles, etc., are present. Our canteen has a good design for winter and summer like providing AC and fans in summer.

reviews.review_heading: Good university, good placements, and has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are very clean and big. Library is the also very clean and pin drop silent in the library, and the pharmacy lab is also very clean, big lab, and secure lab. Food is also good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Sankalchand Patel College of EngineeringReviewed on 1 Oct 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Overall the college has good infrastructure and average placemen
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure facilities like new labs , auditorium . The hostel infrastructure is not enough good but they are renovating. Our college campus is way more better than our college because we have all right to do whatever we want to do.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college in North Gujarat.
reviews.review_text: A library is available. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. Many students borrow books from the library. The quality of food in the canteen and hostels is good. A playground is available. Students play games during sports week. Medical facilities are available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Smt. S.B. Patel Institute of Business ManagementReviewed on 12 Dec 2022)
reviews.review_heading: A very genuine university that teaches very well.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college is very good and attractive. It has very big and separate classrooms for every batch. They provide electricity and washroom service any time. The college has a very big library from where every student can get their reading material without any cost.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Sankalchand Patel College of EngineeringReviewed on 7 Nov 2022)
reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: All labs, classrooms, and the library are good and spacious. They have a good atmosphere for studying. The hostel rooms provide good facilities. The food served in the mess is good. There is a huge hospital on our campus. There are many grounds for different games to play.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Smt. S.B. Patel Institute of Business ManagementReviewed on 15 Oct 2022)
reviews.review_heading: Our institute is one of the best for business management.
reviews.review_text: Our institute has a little old infrastructure with many classrooms, some fully computerised laboratories, and a library for students to go through their study materials. It has many books. Hostels are safe and have good infrastructure in the mess.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Sankalchand Patel College of EngineeringReviewed on 2 Oct 2022)
reviews.review_heading: Average placement, average faculty, and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: In our university, Wi-Fi is free for students in the entire campus. Computer centers are also equipped with Wi-Fi. In our campus labs, library, and classrooms are huge to accommodate a number of students together. But there are no ACs in the classrooms which creates difficulty during summers. Only 2-3 fans are available in such a big classroom. Canteen and cafeteria are also there in the campus. They provide good hygienic food. Cleanliness is key feature of our campus, workers come regularly to ...

reviews.review_heading: It has an amazing infrastructure and a campus with many opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is beautiful. It's been cleaned on a regular basis. The infrastructure is quite amazing. They focus a lot on planting new trees and plants, which has led to beautiful gardens to sit around. The greenery is mesmerizing. The hostel is good. It's open and very clean. The rooms have separate washrooms, so people don't have to share common ones, which is quite hygienic. Wi-Fi is available over the entire campus. The mess facilities are not good these days with the regular changing of the s...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Shri C.J. Patel College of Computer StudiesReviewed on 7 Dec 2021)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Shri C.J. Patel College of Computer Studies.
reviews.review_text: Our campus has a well-equipped infrastructure. Our campus has a playground and well-equipped computer labs. Our college has a good sort of cleanliness. Our classrooms are well-equipped with air-conditioners. Our college has a high-speed Wi-Fi connection.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2020Offered by Sankalchand Patel College of EngineeringReviewed on 1 May 2021)
reviews.review_heading: Somewhat satisfied with good placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in rooms are not much good. Wi-Fi is not provided. The in-time of the hostel is 7 pm. If any student is not in their room, a message will be sent to their parents. The quality of facilities in our hostel, and the quality of food available in the mess and canteen is good. Medical facilities, sports and games are available.

college_info.college_name: Sankalchand Patel University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: The total tuition fee for Sankalchand Patel University is ranges between INR 2 lakh-INR 2.6 lakh. This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Students opting for hostel facility have to pay other fee components such as hostel rent, mess bill, establishment charges, etc. Students need to pay the fee only in the online mode.

Fee schedules for various programmes vary. In comparison to B.A. programmes, B.Tech programmes may cost more. A separate tuition price may apply to each of the many groups for which SPU reserves seats, such as General, SC/ST, OBC, etc. Fees for B.Tech programmes range from INR 41,000 to INR 80,000 for general category candidates. However, the charge will drop from INR 21,000 to INR 41,000 for the SC/ST category. About INR 58,000 for general category applicants and INR 29,000 for SC/ST applicants will be the cost for B.Pharma.

There will be a fee of around INR 48,000 for SC/ST applicants and INR 95,000 for general applicants for BBA.For BCA, the general category price will be approximately INR 45,000, while the SC/ST category fee would be INR 22,000. The additional hostel fees for staying on campus can cost anything from INR 15,000 to INR 25,000 per semester. Meal costs, which range from INR 12,000 to INR 18,000 per semester, are subject to change based on the plan you select.

A total of six scholarships are offered at Sankalchand Patel University for ST students. The family income should be between INR 2.50 lakh-INR 4.50 Lacs as per respective scholarship. Student can check the table below for more details:

Aspirants who wish to avail  the Sankalchand Patel University scholarship for BSc need to ensure they possess the necessary eligibility criteria. The university provides numerous scholarships in order to extend financial assistance to eligible candidates. Aspirants interested in get the scholarship can visit the official website. The university also provides Gujarat government scholarships.

highlights.summary: The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is good in terms of academics and has good faculty members and a hostel.

review_content.Placements: Almost 100% of students got placed in our course. The highest salary package offered ranges between 2.5 LPA - 7 LPA, and the average salary package offered ranges between 1.5 LPA - 2.5 LPA. About 75% of students got internships from our course. The top role offered is teacher and doctor.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our labs and classrooms are good and comfortable. Our college provides a separate hostel for boys and girls. The hostel facilities are good. The hostel provides many facilities like restrooms, common rooms, etc.
review_content.Faculty: Our teachers are MBBS, MD, and Ph.D. holders. They always help us. Our course curriculum is difficult to understand. We have two internal exams, a pre-university exam, and a final exam. Our Sallybus is very long of semester exams.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college for academics.

review_content.Placements: The stipend offered during internship is Rs.20,000 every month.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has its respective department and laboratories. The library is open on working days from 8 AM to 8 PM. The hostel is good and has a gym for boys. Wi-Fi facility and canteen are not provided. Our college has a stadium and a badminton court with a capacity of 50 students.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members in our college are good. Our college follows the CBME pattern. Teachers work in hospitals to treat patients and teach students in OPD wards. Our college is good in academics. Since it is MBBS, exams are difficult.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor Of Physiotherapy - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: The main highlight would be the teaching, and the care taken by the staff is highly inspirable.

review_content.Placements: There were no placements in our college. The students should complete their internship in our Apollo hospitals itself. If they like us, they will place in Apollo hospital, but at very low salaries. There is no need for any of the highest percentage for our field. Self-talent and the knowledge of treatment is the main key. The highest salaries offered in our field is one's own ability to treat the number of patients. Many conference programs are being conducted at our institute. We are provided with valuable international certificates.
review_content.Infrastructure: There will be no Wi-Fi for the students and the classrooms. The sports hours are given once in a week. There are no hostels for the boys provided by the college, and only a girls hostel is provided which is reasonable for the price of Rs.5,000 per month. There are no other issues during the tenure of the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor Of Physiotherapy - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college with a good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Almost 95% of the students from our course got placed. The salary offered is Rs. 25,000 per month. A top recruiting company that visits our campus for placements is Apollo. Almost 90% of the students from our course got an internship. A top role offered is a physiotherapist. It is a good college, but it is very tough to clear subjects.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities. It provides a hostel and library facilities. The hostel facility is only for girls and not for boys. A Wi-Fi facility is available in the library. Labs have a good infrastructure. The food served in the hostel is good and tasty. I like the food in the hostel.

answer.text: Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

lists: Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor Of Physiotherapy - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied with this college.

content.Placements: Almost 80% of students got placed in this course. The average salary offered was Rs 16,000 per month. The highest salary offered was Rs 23,000 per month. The lowest salary offered was Rs 10,000 per month. No recruiting companies visited our college for recruitment. We had to find jobs ourselves. There were no internships in this course. Top roles were offered in this college.
content.Infrastructure: Our college building was rented. Our college management was average. They also give holidays to students at the time of inspection. Girls' hostel was available in this college. There was a decent library on our campus.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor Of Physiotherapy - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college, with good faculty and many facilities with annual sports and games.

content.Placements: In the course, we have fifty members yearly; the highest package is 8 Lacs, and the lowest is 5 Lacs per annum. We may set up a new hospital and join the private or government hospitals and do the jobs. Everyone should have six months of internship after the course.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is poor in our college, but the faculty and the complex block are well-furnished. We have many classrooms and a library and the labs for every subject to prepare well hostel is perfect. A washing machine facility and AC are available we don't have a canteen, but the medical facilities are good, and we have many sports and games.

individual_reviews.title: The main highlight would be the teaching, and the care taken by the staff is highly inspirable.

Self-talent and the knowledge of treatment is the main key. The highest salaries offered in our field is one's own ability to treat the number of patients. Many conference programs are being conducted at our institute. We are provided with valuable international certificates.

There are no other issues during the tenure of the college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor Of Physiotherapy - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Simply the best college in Telugu states.

content.Placements: Placements in medical stream is a rare thing, Getting job depends upon individual talent and as a physical therapist they are entitled for jobs in many hospitals and central institutions, Many people go for private practice by setting up physical therapy clinics.
content.Infrastructure: We have a computer lab and a nice library which is filled with books. There are some sports facilities too, we have a sports meet and a fest every year, there is no shortage of conferences which may go up to 10 years. There is an hostel for girls and it's slightly expensive but facilities are good in that, thumbs down for boys.
